name: consume_messages
description: Consumes messages from Kafka topics in batch operations

topics.description: List of topic names to consume from

max_messages.description: Maximum number of messages to consume

name: list_brokers
description: Lists all configured Kafka broker addresses

name: describe_topic
description: Returns comprehensive metadata about a specific topic including partitions, leaders, replicas, and in-sync replicas

topic_name.description: Name of the topic to describe

name: list_consumer_groups
description: Displays all consumer groups in the cluster with their current states

name: describe_consumer_group
description: Provides detailed group information including members, assignments, and optionally offset/lag data

include_offsets.description: Whether to include offset and lag information

name: describe_configs
description: Retrieves configuration settings for Kafka resources like topics or brokers

name: cluster_overview
description: Summarizes cluster health including broker status, controller info, and replication metrics

name: list_topics
description: Lists all cluster topics with partition counts, replication factors, and internal flags
